schema.name: Card name including any qualifier (e.g. 'Charizard Holo')
schema.rarity: Holo Rare / Special Illustration Rare / Gold Star / etc.
schema.grading_companies: Array of major grading companies that commonly slab this card
schema.era: WOTC / Neo / EX / DP / BW / XY / SM / SWSH / Scarlet & Violet / etc.
schema.notes: Brief context: pop counts, sales records, distinguishing facts

cards.notes: Most graded Pokemon card of all time (~273k PSA submissions). 88% gem rate.
cards.name: Pikachu (McDonald's)

cards.notes: Van Gogh Museum collab. ~105k PSA grades. Most graded English Pokemon card.
cards.name: Pikachu with Grey Felt Hat
cards.set: SVP Black Star Promo (Van Gogh Museum)

cards.notes: Mitsuhiro Arita art callback to Base Set. ~91k graded, 29% gem rate.
cards.name: Charizard ex (Special Illustration Rare)

cards.notes: JP launch promo with Sprigatito/Fuecoco/Quaxly. ~78k PSA grades.
cards.name: Pikachu (Scarlet & Violet Pre-Order Promo)

cards.notes: JP version of Sunbreon. ~74k graded, 87% gem rate.
cards.name: Umbreon ex (Special Art Rare)

cards.notes: Theatrical giveaway. ~72k PSA grades, only 5% gem rate due to embossed surface.

cards.notes: Hit 71k+ PSA grades within ~12 months of release.

cards.notes: Hidden Fates ETB chase. ~65k PSA grades.

cards.notes: Most-graded Pokemon card of H1 2025. ~64k PSA submissions.

cards.notes: 25th Anniversary Base Set Charizard reprint with Celebrations stamp. ~54k graded.

cards.notes: "Moonbreon". The defining modern alt art. PSA 10 ~$2,000+.

cards.notes: The grail. PSA 10 sold $550k Heritage 2025. ~124 PSA 10s known.
cards.name: Charizard Holo (1st Edition Shadowless)

cards.notes: Most graded vintage Pokemon card overall. ~95k PSA submissions, 1% gem rate.
cards.name: Charizard Holo (Unlimited)

cards.notes: The error/early-print Pikachu variant. Highly collected.

cards.notes: Theme deck pull, plentiful in 1st Edition.

cards.notes: First Secret Rare in TCG history.

cards.notes: One of the most beautiful Crystal cards. PSA 10 ~$10k.

cards.notes: Shiny Black Charizard Gold Star. PSA 10 ~$15-22k.

cards.notes: Distributed only via Pokemon Organized Play. PSA 10 ~$50-70k.

cards.notes: POP Series 5 sibling to Umbreon. PSA 10 ~$20-30k.

cards.notes: Tiny PSA 10 pop, fan-favorite starter Gold Star.

cards.notes: Most expensive Pokemon card ever. Logan Paul's PSA 10 sold $16,492,000 Feb 2026.

cards.notes: Pokemon Center exclusive. Skyrocketed from $50 to $300+.
